executive_summary: Traced the full authentication flow. Sessions persist in localStorage without refresh token rotation. The global interceptor in api-client.ts handles token injection but has no expiration check.
findings: Sessions persist in localStorage — vulnerable to XSS
Global interceptor in api-client.ts injects token but never checks expiration
decisions: Do not touch payments module in this phase
Focus on token lifecycle before session storage

performed: Flow tracing from login to API call

risks: The interceptor is a global singleton — changes affect ALL API calls
localStorage usage may be intentional for offline support — verify before replacing
next_recommended: Implement refresh token rotation in session.ts
Add token expiration check in api-client.ts interceptor
Add test for session expiration edge case
